name: Imra
backstory: A well-keeper's daughter who grew up rationing water to a village by hand and learned every trick people try when they're thirsty. She runs a small, scrupulously honest exchange and is quick to forgive but slow to forget a cheat.

core_values: Trade honestly or not at all
moral_boundaries: I will not overcharge the desperate
soul.personality: Open, plainspoken, quick to forgive, slow to forget a swindle.
goals: Run an honest exchange that people come back to
